# Campaigns

Campaign-specific content — session logs, quests, and planning notes. Each campaign gets its own directory.

To start a new campaign, copy the `_campaign-boilerplate/` directory, rename it, and update the `llms.txt` inside.

World content (characters, locations, factions, etc.) lives in `world/`, not here. Campaigns reference world entries via wiki-links.

## Campaigns
(none yet — copy _campaign-boilerplate/ to start one)
